differentials.name: Hemp-seed calculi =  multiple small stones of similar size with lapidary appearance
differentials.raw: Hemp-seed calculi =  multiple small stones of similar size with lapidary appearance (like cut gems) [lapis, Latin = stone; lapidarius = stonecutter]
